title: LLM Text Stream
description: Streaming output from LLM text generation. Each line is a JSON object with a 'type' field (token, status, complete, tool_request, or error).
documentation:
## Purpose
Provides incremental LLM output as newline-delimited JSON (NDJSON). Each line is a self-contained JSON object that consumers can parse and act on as tokens arrive, without waiting for the full response.

## When to use
Use this type for interactive or latency-sensitive applications where displaying tokens as they are generated improves perceived responsiveness. The final `complete` message signals end of stream and carries aggregate statistics. For non-interactive use, prefer [Generated Text](https://capdag.com/browse/media:generated-text;textable;record).

## Notes
The `type` discriminator is required on every message. Consumers must handle all five types: `token` (partial text), `status` (progress update), `complete` (final summary), `tool_request` (the model wants to invoke a tool), and `error` (generation failed). Messages of unknown type should be silently skipped to allow forward compatibility.
